# services.saunafs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.saunafs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.saunafs.chunkserver.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Saunafs chunkserver daemon. |
| `services.saunafs.chunkserver.hdds` | `list of string` | Mount points to be used by chunkserver for storage (see {manpage}`sfshdd.cfg(5)`). Note, that these mount points must writeable by the user defined by the saunafs user. |
| `services.saunafs.chunkserver.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to automatically open the necessary ports in the firewall. |
| `services.saunafs.chunkserver.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (Flat key-value file)` | Contents of chunkserver config file (see {manpage}`sfschunkserver.cfg(5)`). |
| `services.saunafs.chunkserver.settings.DATA_PATH` | `string` | Directory for chunck meta data |
| `services.saunafs.client.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Saunafs client. |
| `services.saunafs.master.enable` | `boolean` | Enable Saunafs master daemon. You need to run `sfsmaster-init` on a freshly installed master server to initialize the `DATA_PATH` directory. |
| `services.saunafs.master.exports` | `list of string` | Paths to exports file (see {manpage}`sfsexports.cfg(5)`). |
| `services.saunafs.master.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to automatically open the necessary ports in the firewall. |
| `services.saunafs.master.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (Flat key-value file)` | Contents of config file ({manpage}`sfsmaster.cfg(5)`). |
| `services.saunafs.master.settings.DATA_PATH` | `string` | Data storage directory. |
| `services.saunafs.masterHost` | `string` | IP or hostname name of master host. |
| `services.saunafs.metalogger.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Saunafs metalogger daemon. |
| `services.saunafs.metalogger.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (Flat key-value file)` | Contents of metalogger config file (see {manpage}`sfsmetalogger.cfg(5)`). |
| `services.saunafs.metalogger.settings.DATA_PATH` | `string` | Data storage directory |
| `services.saunafs.sfsUser` | `string` | Run daemons as user. |
